mapper.select: SELECT id, template_name, tag, purpose, tone, outline_structure, status, create_time FROM cdc_article_template ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, template_name, tag, purpose, tone, outline_structure, status, create_time FROM cdc_article_template ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, template_name, tag, purpose, tone, outline_structure, status, create_time FROM cdc_article_template WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cdc_article_template (template_name, tag, purpose, tone, outline_structure, status, create_time) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{tag}, #{purpose}, #{tone}, #{outlineStructure}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cdc_article_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, tag = #{tag}, purpose = #{purpose}, tone = #{tone}, outline_structure = #{outlineStructure}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
